plan: Plus-High-Speed (same key as the M2.7 campaign)
note: Empirical invariants captured by `m3-cli probe` + `m3-cli context-probe`. `m3-cli verify` re-probes a fast subset and diffs against this file. Bump via review, never blindly. 2026-06-23 re-lock (fast subset re-probed): output ceiling raised 512000 -> 524288; n>1 stopped erroring but is now SILENTLY DROPPED (still returns 1 choice), so supports_n_gt_1 stays false and `m3-cli verify` now requires >1 actual choices to call it supported. Input ceiling + needle retrieval were also re-probed 2026-06-23: input rose ~512K -> ~1,000,000, but deep-retrieval regressed (400K now missed 2/2). Vision + reasoning_split details + tool handling still carry forward from the 2026-06-01 lock.

evidence.max_output_tokens: 2026-06-23: max_tokens=512000 and 524288 accepted; 700000/1000000/1048576/2000000 -> 'invalid params, model[MiniMax-M3] does not support max tokens > 524288'. (Was 512000 on 2026-06-01.)
evidence.input_ceiling: 2026-06-23: prompt_tokens accepted through 800180 (~30s) and 1000180 (~235s, near-timeout); 1048576 & 1200000 -> 'context window exceeds limit' (2013). Input ceiling is now ~1,000,000 tokens — the docs' 1M claim now holds (was ~512K on 2026-06-01). 1M-context latency is very high.
evidence.retrieval: 2026-06-23: needle ZX9Q7-DELTA retrieved at 128K and 256K (2/2 each) but MISSED at 400K (2/2). Deep-retrieval regressed vs 2026-06-01 (which retrieved at 400K) even as the raw input ceiling rose to ~1M. Treat reliable retrieval as <=~256K; reasoning disabled + max_tokens 256.
evidence.reasoning_split: reasoning_split:true -> message.content clean (no <think>); reasoning in reasoning_content (str) + reasoning_details[{type:'reasoning.text',text}]
evidence.n_gt_1: 2026-06-23: n=2 and n=4 NO LONGER error (was 2013 'does not support n > 1' on 2026-06-01) but are SILENTLY DROPPED — response still carries exactly 1 choice. No true multi-sampling, so supports_n_gt_1 stays false; n joins MiniMax's silently-dropped-param set.
evidence.thinking_bool: {'thinking': false} -> 2013 'Mismatch type open_platform_oai.ThinkingConfig with value bool'
evidence.tool_choice_forced: tool_choice:{type:function,...} on a 'Hi' prompt did NOT emit tool_calls (model reasoned 'no tools needed'); needs a tool-relevant prompt to confirm tool-calling works at all
